heroHome.title: Oasi Dolce Vita
heroHome.subtitle: Luxury villa with private pool and tennis court in the Euganean Hills. 30 minutes from Venice, Padua and Verona, 2 hours from the Dolomites.

propertyStory.territoryTitle: A corner of paradise in Lozzo Atestino, among the Euganean Hills
propertyStory.territoryText: Our villa with private pool in Lozzo Atestino, in the heart of Veneto on the Euganean Hills, is the perfect base to explore vineyards, medieval villages and natural hot springs of the Regional Park. Enjoy your holiday villa with pool, tennis court and day trips to Padua and Venice.
propertyStory.experienceText: A journey between pool, nature and Euganean Hills seen from a drone.
propertyStory.spacesTitle: Live the house, inside and out
propertyStory.cardPoolText: Immerse yourself in the crystal clear waters of our private pool in the Euganean Hills. The perfect place to relax and enjoy the silence of the Veneto countryside after exploring Lozzo Atestino and surroundings. Your holiday villa in Veneto with all comforts.
propertyStory.cardTennisText: A match at sunset with the Euganean Hills as your backdrop. Our private tennis court is at your disposal throughout your stay. A unique experience at your holiday villa in Veneto.
propertyStory.cardOutdoorText: Large outdoor spaces between porch and garden with Euganean Hills view, perfect to relax in the shade and breathe fresh air. Ideal for a relaxing holiday in a villa with pool in Veneto with family or friends.
propertyStory.cardIndoorText: Original wooden beams, a cozy fireplace, rooms curated down to the smallest detail. Veneto tradition meets modern comfort in your villa with pool in the Euganean Hills, for a stay where nothing is left to chance.

perfectStay.label: Your holiday
perfectStay.title: Your perfect stay in the Euganean Hills
perfectStay.subtitle: Everything you need for an unforgettable holiday: private pool, tennis court, WiFi and breathtaking Euganean Hills views. Your villa in Lozzo Atestino awaits.

reviews.label: Reviews
reviews.title: What our guests say
texts: We felt at home from the very first moment. The location on the Euganean Hills is wonderful, the pool with valley views is simply extraordinary and the meticulously designed interiors make the stay unforgettable.

A villa immersed in the Euganean Hills with a stunning pool, a well-equipped tennis court and tastefully furnished interiors. Umberto was a caring and helpful host. Our expectations were far exceeded.

The house and property are exceptional, designed with great care and incredibly well maintained. You feel at home from the first moment. Umberto was a thoughtful and attentive host. We enjoyed every single day!

Sublime house and garden, even more beautiful than in the photos. The infinity pool is wonderful and the Euganean Hills were love at first sight. Umberto always available and discreet. Highly recommended!
An absolutely incredible week at Oasi Dolce Vita. The house and the view are breathtaking. Umberto is a fantastic host, always ready to go above and beyond. We used the tennis court every day!

contatti.description: Ready to book your holiday villa with private pool in the Euganean Hills? Contact us to check availability or get more information about Oasi Dolce Vita in Lozzo Atestino. We will reply as soon as possible.

footer.tagline: Villa with private pool and tennis court in Lozzo Atestino, in the heart of the Euganean Hills. Your holiday home in Veneto surrounded by relaxation, nature and comfort.
